{{Missing Info|specifics=description, 1,2,3,4,5 special stats; mirage name and final reward; mirage 1,2,3,4,5}}
{{CargoRelic
|name=The Last Judgement
|rank=SSS
|affct=FTH
|birthday=
|source=Daily Pack Relic #18
|description=
|fame=62
|art=73
|fth=108
|civ=49
|tech=70
|ss1=Snail ATK +?<br>When offering, 2x Chaos Chest Drops +?%<br>Per FTH Master Scroll used, Snail RUSH +?<br>FTH Master Scrolls Used: 10/10 
|ss2=Snail ATK +?<br>When offering, 2x Chaos Chest Drops +?%<br>Per FTH Master Scroll used, Snail RUSH +?<br>FTH Master Scrolls Used: 10/10 
|ss3=Snail ATK +?<br>When offering, 2x Chaos Chest Drops +?%<br>Per FTH Master Scroll used, Snail RUSH +?<br>FTH Master Scrolls Used: 10/10 
|ss4=Snail ATK +?<br>When offering, 2x Chaos Chest Drops +?%<br>Per FTH Master Scroll used, Snail RUSH +?<br>FTH Master Scrolls Used: 10/10 
|ss5=Snail ATK +?<br>When offering, 2x Chaos Chest Drops +?%<br>Per FTH Master Scroll used, Snail RUSH +?<br>FTH Master Scrolls Used: 10/10 
|ss6=Snail ATK +120<br>When offering, 2x Chaos Chest Drops +12%<br>Per FTH Master Scroll used, Snail RUSH +48<br>FTH Master Scrolls Used: 10/10
|ss7=Snail ATK +120<br>When offering, 2x Chaos Chest Drops +12%<br>Per FTH Master Scroll used, Snail RUSH +48<br>FTH Master Scrolls Used: 10/10<br>Snail ATK +100 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, Snail ATK +600
|skill2=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, 2x B-tad Drops +6%
|skill3=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, Earth DMG +300
|mirage={{Mirage|name=|reward=
|3name=|3rec=|3atk=|3def=|3hp=|3weak=
|4name=|4rec=|4atk=|4def=|4hp=|4weak=
|5name=|5rec=|5atk=|5def=|5hp=|5weak=
|6name=|6rec=|6atk=|6def=|6hp=|6weak=
|Arec=|Aatk=|Adef=|Ahp=|Aweak=
}}
}}

[[Category:RUSH Boost]]
[[Category:ATK Boost]]
[[Category:Rift Museum Boost]]
[[Category:Rift Exploration Boost]]
[[Category:Divine Chaos Chest Drop Boost]]
[[Category:Leadership Boost]]
[[Category:Daily Pack Relics]]
